# GameZipper Tools - Free Online Tools
> 80+ free browser-based tools. No signup, no download, no backend required.
> URL: https://tools.gamezipper.com

## Text Tools
- Case Converter: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/case-converter.html
- Word & Character Counter: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/letter-counter.html
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/lorem-ipsum.html
- Text Diff Checker: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/diff.html
- Markdown Preview: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/markdown.html
- Slug Generator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/slug.html
- Bionic Reading: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/bionic.html
- Handwriting Effect: https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/handwriting.html

- HTML Encode/Decode: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/html-encode.html
- Chmod Calculator: https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/chmod.html
